task_details.delay_risks: Delays in data collection from various sources, inconsistencies in data formats, and potential difficulties in accessing necessary data due to privacy regulations or system limitations.
task_details.mitigation_strategy: Establish clear data sharing agreements with all partners, develop standardized data collection templates, and implement robust data validation procedures. Allocate sufficient time for data cleaning and preparation.

task_details.delay_risks: Difficulties in recruiting participants for data collection, potential for low response rates, and challenges in ensuring the accuracy and completeness of the collected data.
task_details.mitigation_strategy: Offer incentives for participation, utilize multiple data collection methods to increase response rates, and implement quality control measures to ensure data accuracy. Provide clear instructions and support to data collectors.

task_details.delay_risks: Challenges in accessing homes for intervention effectiveness data collection, potential for participant drop-out, and difficulties in accurately measuring the impact of home interventions due to confounding factors.
task_details.mitigation_strategy: Establish strong relationships with participants, provide flexible scheduling options for data collection, and utilize control groups or comparison data to isolate the impact of home interventions. Implement standardized measurement protocols.
